title: Submitting a Grievance, Complaint, or HR Concern
text:
Q: How do I submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern?
A: To submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern, please follow these steps: First, document the issue clearly, including dates, times, and any relevant details. Next, reach out to your immediate supervisor or manager to discuss the matter informally. If the issue is not resolved or if you are uncomfortable speaking with your supervisor, you can submit a formal grievance by completing the Grievance Form available on the company intranet. Submit the completed form to the HR department via email or in person. HR will acknowledge receipt of your grievance within 3 business days and will initiate an investigation, which typically takes up to 15 business days. You will receive updates throughout the process, and a final resolution will be communicated to you in writing. For any urgent concerns or if you need assistance, you can contact the HR department directly at hr@company.com or call extension 1234.
